---

Click new campaign and choose objective
Choose the one conversion goal you want to optimize for
Performance Max, will need up to 5 videos and 20 images
Select campaign type (format of ads)
• If video ads, will need video ad on YouTube
• If display, will need to have banners designed
• If shopping ads, will need to connect account
Choose campaign settings based on ad type
Choose a daily budget and bidding strategy
CAMPAIGN SETUP
Get your ad live and monitor it every day!
Grant Cardone Enterprises, Inc · chat@grantcardone.com · 800-368-5771 · GrantCardone.com

Every type of campaign will differ, but here is what matters most…
Define location (international, national or local)
Define audience segments (new or use manager)
• For search, choose and refine target keywords
• Search and browse interests, demographics, etc
• Expand audience by adding additional segments
• Refine with targeting or advanced settings (optional)
Select language and setting (varies by campaign)
AD GROUP SETUP
If video, add video ad URL from YouTube
Add landing page final URL and display path
Create multiple headlines (action/benefit based)
Write multiple descriptions (differentiate/give CTA)
Optionally add tracking or other various ad options
AD SETUP
AD CREATION AND LAUNCHING CHECKLIST
